message:
feat(demo): add toggleable FPS render mode in visual effects showcase

Add 'r' keybind to toggle between Braille (high-density dot) and
HalfBlock (colored block pixel) rendering modes for the Doom/Quake
visual effects demo. Includes new fps_render_mode field, key handler,
header display update, and help text entry.

Skipped ephemeral: .scratch/, .tmp_darklynx/, python scripts in
crates/ftui-extras/src/, storage.sqlite3-*, crates/ftui-extras/target/.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
